transcript.content:
PLAN_STATE: Start from the baseline for all three components, then prioritize the one with the clearest path to a feasible improvement. Use the first subtask to inspect the likely bottleneck structure of the easiest-looking component and aim for one strong candidate rather than spreading effort thinly. If that candidate looks promising, reuse the same reasoning pattern on the remaining two components; otherwise, pivot to the component with the highest expected gain per unit time. Keep the portfolio objective in mind: maximize total captured headroom, not just one component’s score.
